author: Crystal Carter
title: How to plan for GEO in 2026 and evolve your search strategy
content: Article on Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) planning for 2026. Carter discusses strategies for optimizing brand entity recognition in AI search platforms, managing visibility across ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and other LLMs. The article addresses GEO as the practice of structuring content and digital presence so AI-powered platforms cite, recommend, or mention brands when users ask questions. According to EMARKETER forecasts cited, nearly one-third of US population will use generative AI search in 2026.
